items.title: 'Finally': Norway star Erling Haaland on fulfillin...
items.summary: Erling Haaland tells ESPN he is ready to make his World Cup debut and show his love for Norway on football's biggest stage.

items.title: Why Michael Olise is the key to France's World Cup...
items.summary: Olise had to wait for his call up to the France senior side, but now it's all eyes on the Bayern Munich star.

items.title: Tigers' Keith slugs 3 HRs, upping '26 total to 4
items.summary: Colt Keith hit three home runs and had six RBI as the Detroit Tigers took down the Houston Astros 9-3 on Monday night.

items.title: 'Energetic' Raleigh set to return to M's Tuesday
items.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh, on the injured list since May 14 with a right oblique strain, is set to return to the lineup on Tuesday against the Baltimore Orioles, and seems ready to improve on his .161 batting average through 41 games this year.

items.title: Strider sees specialist, shut down for 4 weeks
items.summary: The Braves have shut down Spencer Strider for four weeks due to elbow inflammation, but Atlanta did get some good news with the return of catcher Drake Baldwin.

items.title: De La Cruz runs bases; rehab assignment soon
items.summary: Reds shortstop Elly De La Cruz, who has been sidelined since June 1 with a hamstring strain, ran the bases on Monday could go on a rehab assignment this weekend.

items.title: Pads' Marinaccio gets 3 games for Henderson HBP
items.summary: San Diego pitcher Ron Marinaccio has been issued a three-game suspension and a fine for hitting Baltimore's Gunnar Henderson on Saturday, and Padres manager Craig Stammen was suspended one game and fined as well.

items.title: ⚽ Red Sox host 'Scotland Day' amid World Cup
items.summary: The Tartan Army -- Scotland's supporters organization -- led a fan march from Evans Way Park to the ballpark, bagpipe music and all.

items.title: Copy of New York wins! Inside the locker room of the first...
items.summary: For decades, the Knicks flailed and chased -- for quick fixes, superstars, splashy hires. But then they chose Jalen Brunson, and the rest is history.

items.title: Copy of The Knicks are deserving champs, but their path to...
items.summary: The New York Knicks, after 53 years of waiting, are finally NBA champions again.
